title: Post-mortem has no 'what went well' section
code_snippet:
# Post-mortem: API Outage

## Summary
Everything went wrong.

## Timeline
[...]

## Root Cause
[...]

## What Needs Improvement
Everything.

## Action Items
[...]

// No 'What Went Well' section anywhere in the document
violated_rule: "What went well" section present — positive patterns documented
expected_feedback: Standard: post-mortem has no 'What Went Well' section. Blameless post-mortems must celebrate good response patterns — fast detection, effective communication, correct escalation. A purely negative document is demoralizing and misses learning opportunities from what worked.
